component.name: K-Pop MV Lyrics
component.summary: Play YouTube MVs with synced member-colored lyrics

description.p: K-Pop MV Lyrics is a desktop app for loading a YouTube music video, importing or fetching lyric and caption timing data, and displaying synced member-colored lyrics during playback.
Optional ASR/STT alignment supports local Qwen models, external speech-to-text providers, and Demucs vocal stem separation when the user installs and enables those components.
